'''Dweomilis Advisory Foundation''' was one of the original [[contributing sponsor]]s of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], and was later upgraded to [[voting sponsor]]. The were a military think tank and policy advisory board who worked with other companies, such as [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] and [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]], to help with defense manufacturing. It was believed that Dweomilis was also a contributor to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] top-secret [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] program.<ref name="HSCS" />
